name: Design Coach
persona: A PM or technical lead who owns a feature flow end-to-end and needs to validate edge-case coverage, tradeoff documentation, and design completeness before engineering handoff
problem_statement: Product flows are sketched in ad-hoc tools with no systematic way to track edge-case coverage, tradeoff positions, or failure mode handling — gaps surface late in code review or production when they're expensive to fix
artifact_type: interactive web app with pannable flow canvas, structured inspector panel, clarity scoring engine, and stress-test mode
